description: Cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in Organic Groups (OG) Vocabulary 5.x before 5.x-1.1 and 6.x before 6.x-1.1, a module for Drupal, allows remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via the group title.
